accent.role: urgency, CTAs, links, hover states, skill bars

hero.headline: Alex Morgan
hero.mission: I craft digital experiences that feel human — blending research, design, and code to build products people love to use.
hero.hero_image_prompt: Minimalist designer desk setup with sketchbook, wireframe sketches, and a MacBook showing a clean UI design. Warm natural lighting, aerial flatlay view, elegant and modern composition with subtle coral and navy accents.

projects.title: Mindful Dashboard
projects.description: A mental wellness analytics platform helping therapists track patient progress through intuitive data visualization and mood journaling.

projects.title: Nomad Travel App
projects.description: End-to-end travel companion app with smart itinerary planning, offline maps, and local experience curation for digital nomads.

projects.title: Finwise Redesign
projects.description: Complete redesign of a fintech platform based on 40+ user interviews, resulting in a 35% increase in user retention and task completion.

projects.title: Artisan Marketplace
projects.description: A community-driven marketplace connecting local artisans with conscious consumers, featuring a peer-to-peer messaging system and verified reviews.

about.bio: I'm Alex — a UX designer with 8+ years of experience turning complex problems into elegant, user-centered solutions. I believe the best designs come from deep listening: to users, to data, and to the teams who bring products to life. When I'm not pushing pixels, you'll find me mentoring junior designers, writing about design systems, or experimenting with creative code.

timeline.title: Design Degree
timeline.description: Graduated with a BFA in Interaction Design from Parsons School of Design, where I fell in love with human-centered research methods.

timeline.title: Senior UX at Finwise
timeline.description: Led the UX team through a major platform redesign, growing the user base from 50K to 200K monthly active users.

timeline.title: Independent Practice
timeline.description: Launched my own design studio, partnering with startups and scale-ups to build products that balance business goals with genuine user value.

testimonials.quote: Alex is the rare designer who truly understands both the user and the business. Our engagement doubled within three months of the redesign.
testimonials.author: Sarah Chen

testimonials.quote: Working with Alex felt like having a design partner, not a consultant. Every decision was backed by research and delivered with care.
testimonials.author: Marcus Rivera

testimonials.quote: The design system Alex built for us has become the backbone of our product. It's clean, scalable, and our engineers love it.
testimonials.author: Priya Patel

cta_section.headline: Let's build something meaningful together.
cta_section.subheadline: Currently available for select projects and collaborations.
